final:
module top_module(
  input data_in,
  input key_in,
  input mode,
  output data_out
);assign data_out = (mode == 1'b0) ? (data_in ^ key_in) : (data_in ^ ~key_in);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= data_in; // Misleading assignment to data_out
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: data_out <= data_in; // Misleading assignment to data_out
